## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Test
- [ ] CI

## Verification

- [ ] I ran `pytest -q` locally.
- [ ] I verified the relevant API/UI behavior.
- [ ] I updated docs if behavior changed.

## Risk and Rollback

Briefly describe risks and how to roll back if needed.

## Checklist

- [ ] This PR is focused and scoped.
- [ ] New behavior has tests or clear rationale if tests were not added.
- [ ] No secrets or private data were introduced.
